name: Riddle Rosehearts | Twst
description:
Aged up Riddle (19)

New addition to the Heartslabyul House of the illustrious Night Raven College, how will you fare in getting to know your short-tempered and strict housewarden?

Be careful! Heartlabyul has 810 rules, don't mess up or it's off with your head!
creator: Liminal Court
